ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the document */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the document */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website where the document was found */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the document */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_url FOREIGN KEY ("url") REFERENCES websites ("url"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Policy Change, User Choice/Control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., Introductory/Generic, Unspecified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the website */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the website was checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being labeled */,
  "label_text" TEXT /* Text of the label */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the label within the document */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the label within the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_labels_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
